TRIAL MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-28-2002 IN 503, PROVE-UP HEARING AS TO DEFT WESTERN MACARTHUR BY PLFT BRENDEN JOHNSON (ASBESTOS) APPEARANCE: CHRIS ANDREAS, ESQ. OF BRAYTON-PURCELL, 415/898-1555 ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF(S). NO APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF WESTERN MACARTHUR. MATTER WAS SUBMITTED ON THE PAPERS.
